name: Insta360 X4 Screen Protector
description: This Screen Protector from Insta360 is designed to protect the display of your X4 action camera. The custom-fit tempered glass protector is curved to cover every inch of your screen.

features.Key Features: Custom curved design for a precise fit with flawless coverage. | Strong tempered glass for greater protection. | High-definition display and crystal clear transparency. | Comes with a Protector Application Kit.
features.What's In The Box: 1x Screen Protector | 1x Alignment Tool | 1x Scraper | 1x Film Removal Stick | 1x Protector Application Kit* | *Protector Application Kit contains: 1x Screen Cleaning Wipe, 1x Screen Cloth, 1x Dust Removal Sticker.
